summary: Comprehensive testing of Sophie Lamour website iteration 5 changes completed successfully. All 13 requested features verified working: favicon redesign with botanical flower, logo tagline in header/footer, Yoga du Rire moved from techniques to services (5 services, 3 techniques), mobile responsive, language toggle, contact form with yoga-du-rire, admin dashboard.
seed_data_creation: Test contact requests created during backend tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified all new changes: 1) Favicon SVG at /favicon.svg has botanical flower design (5 petals, coral dot, navy circle), 2) Header logo has tagline 'Coach de vie & développement' below it, 3) Footer logo inside frosted glass card with tagline, 4) Services dropdown has 5 items (personnel, professionnel, parentalité, home-organising, yoga-du-rire), 5) Homepage services section has 5 cards including Yoga du Rire, 6) Homepage techniques section has only 3 items (Ikigaï, Art-thérapie, Pleine conscience - NO Yoga du Rire), 7) /services page shows 5 services, 8) /services/yoga-du-rire page accessible, 9) Contact form has 6 checkboxes including yoga-du-rire, 10) Mobile hamburger menu works with services dropdown, 11) Language toggle FR/EN works, 12) Backend POST /api/contact accepts yoga-du-rire, 13) Admin dashboard shows contact messages with service tags.

features_tested.header_logo_with_tagline: PASS - Header logo is sophie_logo.jpg with 'Coach de vie & développement' tagline below
features_tested.footer_logo_with_tagline: PASS - Footer logo inside frosted glass card with tagline
features_tested.favicon_svg_botanical: PASS - /favicon.svg accessible with 5 petals, coral dot, navy circle design
features_tested.services_dropdown_5_items: PASS - Shows 5 services: personnel, professionnel, parentalité, home-organising, yoga-du-rire
features_tested.homepage_services_5_cards: PASS - 5 service cards including Yoga du Rire
features_tested.homepage_techniques_3_items: PASS - Only 3 techniques: Ikigaï, Art-thérapie, Pleine conscience (NO Yoga du Rire)
features_tested.mobile_responsive: PASS - Hamburger menu works, services dropdown works in mobile
features_tested.backend_contact_api: PASS - POST /api/contact accepts yoga-du-rire in interestedServices
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Login works, contact messages view shows service tags

test_categories: Contact API with Yoga du Rire (2 tests)
Admin Auth with httpOnly cookies (3 tests)
